Title: Night at the Museum: Kahmunrah Rises Again
Writer: Ray DeLaurentis, William Schifrin, Milan Trenc
Actors: Joshua Bassett, Jamie Demetriou, Alice Isaaz
Plot: Nick Daley hesitates becoming a museum nightwatchman and Kahmunrah returns to conquer the world.
Country: United States, Philippines, Canada, France, China
